title: HypurrCo AMAs: Felix Protocol launch!
summary_title: Felix's native stablecoin FEUSD goes live on Hyperliquid, hits 10M cap in 48 hours
summary_description: CDP protocol launches FEUSD stablecoin backed by Hype collateral with unique redemption mechanics and unexpected early demand.

key_moments.label: Felix launches FEUSD stablecoin, live 48 hours
Charlie explains Felix: native money market for Hyperliquid power users
FEUSD mechanics: mint against collateral, earn yield in stability pool
5M cap filled in one hour, silently raised to 10M overnight
Cap increase announced for 8 PM CET same day
Redemption mechanism: any FEUSD redeemable for $1 collateral anytime
Incentives program rolling out Friday, similar to Hyperliquid structure
Integrations coming with PVP Trade and across Hyperliquid ecosystem
